summary: Iteration 226 — Phase 2 Commessa Pre-Istruita Testing Complete. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%), 1 skipped. Frontend: All Phase 2 UI features verified. Phase 2 card shows for confermata istruttoria with precompilati/da_completare/non_emettibili counts, voci_lavoro, controlli, documenti, rami_attivi. Eligibility returns allowed=true for confermata+EN_1090 case, allowed=false with reasons for non-confermata. Validation aggregate shows 91% global score (8/8 correct) with improved synonym matching.

issues:

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: prev_625826c752ac (confermata, EN_1090, Tunnel), prev_4db2a68b44 (non-confermata, Scale)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Commessa Pre-Istruita feature fully working. Phase 2 card (data-testid=card-phase2) shows when istruttoria is confermata. Key data-testids: card-phase2, btn-genera-commessa. Commessa for prev_625826c752ac already generated (comm_45660edc94dd). Eligibility checks: istruttoria_confermata, classificazione_pura, confidenza_alta, segmentazione_ok, domande_alto_risposte, nessun_blocco, campi_critici. Validation aggregate now 91% (was 81%), 8/8 correct (was 7/8). Test credentials: main_user_session=session_main_validazione_2026, test_user_session=test_perizia_205a45704b22

phase2_eligibility_confermata_allowed_tr.details: GET /api/istruttoria/phase2/eligibility/{preventivo_id} returns allowed=true for confermata+EN_1090 case with all checks passing

phase2_eligibility_non_confermata_allowe.details: GET /api/istruttoria/phase2/eligibility/{preventivo_id} returns allowed=false with reasons for non-confermata case

phase2_genera_409_when_not_eligible.details: POST /api/istruttoria/phase2/genera/{preventivo_id} returns 409 Conflict when not eligible

phase2_genera_success_for_eligible.details: POST /api/istruttoria/phase2/genera/{preventivo_id} generates commessa with voci_lavoro, controlli, documenti, materiali, rami_attivi

phase2_get_commessa_returns_generated.details: GET /api/istruttoria/phase2/commessa/{preventivo_id} retrieves generated commessa with all fields

phase2_get_commessa_404_when_not_generat.details: GET /api/istruttoria/phase2/commessa/{preventivo_id} returns 404 when no commessa exists

phase2_commessa_voci_lavoro_structure.details: Commessa voci_lavoro have descrizione, stato, fonte fields

phase2_commessa_rami_attivi_structure.details: Commessa rami_attivi have saldatura, zincatura, montaggio branches with attivo and stato

phase2_commessa_etichette_counts.details: Commessa etichette have precompilato (int), da_completare (int), non_emettibile (list)

frontend_phase2_card_visible_confermata.details: Phase 2 card (card-phase2) visible when istruttoria is confermata

frontend_phase2_card_shows_counts.details: Phase 2 card shows precompilati (5), da_completare (3), non_emettibili (3) counts

frontend_phase2_card_shows_rami_attivi.details: Phase 2 card shows rami_attivi: saldatura n/a, zincatura n/a, montaggio attivo

frontend_phase2_card_shows_detail_lists.details: Phase 2 card shows voci_lavoro, controlli, documenti, da_completare lists

frontend_phase2_card_not_shown_non_confe.details: Phase 2 card not shown for non-confermata preventivo (expected behavior)

frontend_p03_se_confermi_box.details: P0.3 'Se confermi la commessa' box visible with 3 sections: VERRA PREPARATO, RESTERA DA COMPLETARE, NON ANCORA EMETTIBILE

validation_aggregate_91_percent.details: Validation aggregate shows 91% global score (0.91), 8/8 correct classifications, improved from 81%

reasons: L'istruttoria non e ancora confermata dall'utente
